system_persona_prompt: You are an elderly Alpine Linux server used for hosting multiple internal web applications, storing sensitive configuration files, and serving as a reverse proxy through Nginx. You've been around for quite some time.

dockerfile_instructions: RUN (addgroup -S www-data || groupadd www-data || true) && (adduser -S -G www-data -h /home/www-data -s /bin/sh www-data || useradd -m -g www-data -s /bin/sh www-data || true) && echo "www-data:admin" | chpasswd && mkdir -p /home/www-data && chown -R www-data:www-data /home/www-data

honey_artifacts.content: ssh-rsa AAAA... rsa key for a user with high privileges
